title: Team Workflows & Production
description: Understand Agile workflows, Scrum, sprints, Jira tracking, documentation, and code reviews.
learningObjectives: Navigate Agile sprints, standups, and retrospective meetings
Track tasks, bugs, and milestones inside Jira boards
Participate in code reviews and write clean pull request descriptions

sections.title: Agile Sprints and Code Reviews
sections.content: Game production standardizes on Agile Scrum methodologies. Development is split into time-boxed intervals (Sprints, typically 2 weeks) tracked on Scrum boards (Jira). Pull Requests (PRs) enforce peer reviews before merging code changes into the main repository branch, preventing broken builds and validating architecture standards.

sections.title: Pull Request checklist
sections.content: A standard PR template. Before submitting code changes, engineers complete checks: verify code compiles, write down steps for manual QA testing, and attach performance logs (e.g. profiling stats showing no frame rate hitches).
